title: wendlandia longifolia
intro: Wendlandia longifolia, also known as 'Dhonge' in Nepali, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. Wendlandia longifolia can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
